deploy.startCommand: node -e 'const http = require("http"); const fs = require("fs"); const path = require("path"); const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { let file = req.url === "/" ? "/index.html" : req.url; const filePath = path.join("./dist", file); try { const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath); res.writeHead(200, { "Content-Type": "text/html" }); res.end(content); } catch (e) { try { const index = fs.readFileSync("./dist/index.html"); res.writeHead(200, { "Content-Type": "text/html" }); res.end(index); } catch (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end("Not Found"); } } }); server.listen(3000);'
